sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتِ الْأُمُّ أَنْ تَعْرِفَ رَقْمَ الطَّبِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je htjela znati doktorov broj.
sentences.translationEn: The mother wanted to know the doctor's number.

sentences.translation: Tražila ga je na internetu i pronašla ga.
sentences.translationEn: She searched for it on the internet and found it.

sentences.translation: Nazvala ga je i rezervisala termin za sina.
sentences.translationEn: She called him and booked an appointment for her son.

sentences.translation: Zapisala je broj u bilježnicu za budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: She wrote the number in her notebook for the future.
